target.title: Add QA scorecard taxonomy validation
target.body:
## Summary

- Add an executable QA evidence mapping overlay beside the authoritative root `taxonomy.yaml` maturity taxonomy from #91512.
- Define stable executable category IDs from taxonomy surface/category refs and map existing `qa/scenarios/**` coverage IDs to those categories.
- Define only `smoke-ci` and `release` profile membership in the checked-in root `taxonomy-mappings.yaml` overlay.
- Keep advisory compatibility as report-only metadata with no runnable profile membership.
- Validate missing coverage mappings, scenario/docs/code refs, invalid taxonomy/category/profile refs, release-blocking `release` membership, non-advisory rows without current runnable membership, advisory rows assigned to profiles, and retired profile names.
- Render the non-blocking executable mapping and validation warning shape in `openclaw qa coverage`.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`
- `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --output /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-scorecard.md`
- `git diff --check origin/dallin/evidence-summary-normalization...HEAD`
- `git diff --check`
- live PR diff check for personal-name owner references

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: QA coverage inventory emits an executable evidence-map section layered on `taxonomy.yaml`, with checked-in `smoke-ci`/`release` profile membership and non-blocking validation warnings.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on branch `dallin/coverage-taxonomy-validation` rebased onto the updated #91484 branch.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`; `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --output /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-scorecard.md`; `git diff --check origin/dallin/evidence-summary-normalization...HEAD`; `git diff --check`; live PR diff name check.

Evidence after fix: Focused Vitest passed 1 file / 11 tests; coverage report rendered `Mapping: taxonomy-mappings.yaml`, `Maturity taxonomy: taxonomy.yaml`, `Maturity score snapshot: docs/maturity-scores.yaml`, `Profiles: 2`, `smoke-ci` and `release` profile sections, advisory compatibility as `profiles: none`, and `Validation warnings: 0`.

Observed result after fix: `taxonomy.yaml` remains the maturity taxonomy source of truth, `taxonomy-mappings.yaml` provides executable QA joins/profile selectors beside it, and current profile terminology is limited to `smoke-ci`/`release` without a separate scorecard lane layer.

What was not tested: full changed gate, release CI, and live provider lanes are not part of this scoped report-only foundation.
